findings.description: The title for s2 is set to the parent heading "拡張例" rather than the actual subsection heading "プロジェクト固有のアノテーションとバリデーションロジックを追加したい". In the source RST, "拡張例" (underlined with ---) is the parent section and "プロジェクト固有のアノテーションとバリデーションロジックを追加したい" (underlined with ~~~) is the specific subsection that contains the actual content. Since there is only one subsection under 拡張例, the more descriptive subsection title should be used to give AI assistants a clear signal of what this section covers.
findings.source_evidence: Source has: 拡張例 (---) as parent, then プロジェクト固有のアノテーションとバリデーションロジックを追加したい (~~~) as the actual content subsection.
